title: Mumbai court refuses to stay OTT release of Dhurandhar 2 in plagiarism suit
description: A Mumbai civil court on Thursday refused to stall the OTT release of a Hindi film in connection with a plagiarism suit by writer Santosh Kumar RS (plaintiff) [Santosh Kumar RS v. Aditya Dhar & Ors.].Ad-hoc judge Yunus MD Hanif Kharadi held that Kumar failed to establish a prima facie case of copying or make out any urgency for interim relief.The Court further observed that Kumar had not made out the case to show the similarity of scripts and dialogues.“Prima facie Kumar has not made out the
